title: Polymer clay miniature fairy garden house
notes: A miniature house approximately 80 mm tall with a removable conical roof. Slab walls joined around a cardboard box former (removed before curing). Windows and door cut out and framed. Roof made from layered petal-shaped slabs (like fish scales or tile shingles). Cured in stages. Detailed: painted-on vines, tiny flowers as coil-and-ball decorations. For a fairy garden planter or indoor display. Entirely polymer — no air-dry.
